users.name: Priya Sharma
users.bio: Passionate about AI and web development. Love building things that matter. Currently exploring machine learning and its applications in education.

users.name: Dr. Rajesh Kumar
users.bio: 20+ years in academia. Research interests include distributed systems and cloud computing. Passionate about mentoring the next generation of engineers.

users.name: Arjun Mehta
users.bio: President of Tech Club. Organizing hackathons and building a community of tech enthusiasts on campus.

events.title: TechSpark Hackathon 2026
events.description: A 48-hour hackathon bringing together the brightest student minds to build innovative solutions. Form teams of 2-4 and compete for exciting prizes including internship opportunities and tech gadgets. Mentors from top tech companies will be available throughout the event.

events.title: AI & Machine Learning Workshop
events.description: An intensive hands-on workshop covering the fundamentals of AI and ML. Learn about neural networks, deep learning, and practical applications. Bring your laptops with Python pre-installed. Suitable for beginners and intermediate learners.

events.title: Annual Cultural Fest - Rhythm 2026
events.description: The biggest cultural event of the year is here! Three days of music, dance, drama, and art. Featuring performances by student bands, dance troupes, and special guest artists. Open to all students and faculty.

events.title: Inter-College Basketball Tournament
events.description: The annual inter-college basketball championship. Teams from 12 colleges will compete in a knockout format. Come support your team and enjoy thrilling matches!

events.title: Startup Pitch Competition
events.description: Got a startup idea? Present it to a panel of investors and industry leaders. Top 3 teams get seed funding and incubation support. Register your team and submit your pitch deck by June 19.

events.title: Web Development Bootcamp
events.description: A week-long bootcamp covering modern web development with React, Node.js, and MongoDB. By the end, you'll have built a complete full-stack application. Limited seats!

clubs.name: Tech Club
clubs.description: The largest technical community on campus. We organize hackathons, coding contests, workshops, and tech talks. Whether you're a beginner or an expert, there's a place for you.
clubs.longDescription: Tech Club is the premier technology community at our campus, founded in 2018 with a mission to foster innovation and technical excellence. We host weekly coding sessions, monthly hackathons, and annual tech festivals. Our members have gone on to work at Google, Microsoft, Amazon, and various startups. We welcome students from all departments who share a passion for technology.

clubs.name: Cultural Committee
clubs.description: We bring campus to life with music, dance, drama, and art. From annual fests to intimate jam sessions, we celebrate creativity in every form.
clubs.longDescription: The Cultural Committee is the heart and soul of campus cultural life. We organize the annual cultural festival 'Rhythm', manage all inter-college cultural competitions, and support student artists. Our sub-cells include Music, Dance, Drama, Fine Arts, and Literary Arts.
clubs.recentActivity: Preparing for Rhythm 2026 - Annual Cultural Fest

clubs.name: Sports Council
clubs.description: Promoting fitness and sportsmanship across campus. We manage all inter and intra-college sports events, from cricket to athletics.
clubs.longDescription: The Sports Council oversees all sporting activities on campus. We manage facilities, organize tournaments, coordinate with other colleges for inter-college events, and promote fitness culture. Our teams have won multiple state-level championships.

clubs.name: AI Research Group
clubs.description: Exploring the frontiers of artificial intelligence. We conduct research projects, reading groups, and hands-on ML workshops.
clubs.longDescription: The AI Research Group brings together students passionate about artificial intelligence and machine learning. We run paper reading groups, collaborative research projects, and practical ML workshops. Our members have published papers in top conferences including NeurIPS and ICML.
clubs.recentActivity: ML Workshop with hands-on TensorFlow session

announcements.title: Assignment 3 Deadline Extended
announcements.content: Due to multiple requests, the deadline for Assignment 3 (Data Structures) has been extended to June 22nd, 2026. Please make sure to submit your solutions via the portal before 11:59 PM.
announcements.author: Dr. Rajesh Kumar
announcements.aiSummary: Assignment 3 deadline moved to June 22nd. Submit via portal by 11:59 PM.

announcements.title: Mid-Semester Exam Schedule Released
announcements.content: The mid-semester examination schedule for all departments has been published. Exams will begin on July 7th and conclude on July 15th. Please check the examination portal for your specific schedule and seat assignments.
announcements.author: Examination Cell
announcements.aiSummary: Mid-sem exams from July 7-15. Check portal for schedule and seat numbers.

resources.title: Web Dev Bootcamp
resources.description: A comprehensive guide to full-stack web development. Perfect for beginners and intermediate developers. Covers HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB.
resources.author: Code Club
topics: HTML5 & CSS3: Semantic markup, flexbox, grid, and animations
JavaScript (ES6+): Closures, async/await, and DOM manipulation
React: Hooks, state management (Redux/Context), and routing
Node.js & Express: Building RESTful APIs and middleware
MongoDB: Mongoose schemas, queries, and aggregations
Deployment: Deploying to Vercel, Render, and AWS

Hello rohit! As a student from the CS department, you might find these upcoming events and clubs interesting:

**Upcoming Events:**
*   [TechSpark Hackathon 2026](/events/1) on June 20th – perfect for coding and innovation!
*   [AI & Machine Learning Workshop](/events/2) on June 18th – a great chance to dive into AI.

Also, don't miss the [Assignment 3 Deadline Extended](/dashboard) announcement, which might be relevant to your courses.

It looks like you might be interested in some tech-related activities. Here are a couple of suggestions:

Don't forget to check out the latest announcements, including the [Assignment 3 Deadline Extended](/dashboard) and [Mid-Semester Exam Schedule Released](/dashboard).

Let me know if you're looking for something specific!

messages.message: events ke bare mein bta do
messages.text: events ke bare mein bta do

messages.message:
नमस्ते rohit! CampusPulse पर आपका स्वागत है।

यहाँ CampusPulse पर कुछ रोमांचक आने वाले इवेंट्स हैं जिनके बारे में आपको जानना चाहिए:

आपके CS बैकग्राउंड को देखते हुए, ये इवेंट्स आपके लिए बेहद फायदेमंद हो सकते हैं:

*   [TechSpark Hackathon 2026](/events/1) (20 जून): कोडिंग और इनोवेशन के लिए एक बेहतरीन मौका।
*   [AI & Machine Learning Workshop](/events/2) (18 जून): AI और मशीन लर्निंग में अपनी स्किल्स बढ़ाएं।
*   [Web Development Bootcamp](/events/6) (28 जून): वेब डेवलपमेंट की दुनिया में गहराई से उतरें।
*   [Startup Pitch Competition](/events/5) (23 जून): अगर आप एंटरप्रेन्योरशिप में रुचि रखते हैं, तो यह आपके लिए है।

अन्य इवेंट्स में शामिल हैं:

*   [Annual Cultural Fest - Rhythm 2026](/events/3) (25 जून)
*   [Inter-College Basketball Tournament](/events/4) (22 जून)

किसी भी इवेंट के बारे में अधिक जानकारी के लिए, आप लिंक पर क्लिक कर सकते हैं!

messages.message:
Thik hai, rohit! How can I help you today?

Since you're from the CS department, you might be interested in these upcoming tech opportunities:
*   Join the [TechSpark Hackathon 2026](/events/1) on June 20th for coding and innovation.
*   Enhance your skills at the [AI & Machine Learning Workshop](/events/2) on June 18th.

Consider exploring the [Tech Club](/clubs/1) or the [AI Research Group](/clubs/7) to connect with like-minded individuals and further your interests.

Also, a reminder: the deadline for Assignment 3 (Data Structures) has been extended to June 22nd. Check the [Assignment 3 Deadline Extended](/dashboard) announcement for details.

Let me know if you have any specific questions or want to explore more!

*   [Tech Club](/clubs/1)
